name: Touhou Genso Wanderer -FORESIGHT-
short_description: Delve into the latest chapter of the Genso Wanderer Series, Touhou Genso Wanderer - FORESIGHT - a brand new dungeon crawler RPG adventure set in the Touhou universe.
detailed_description:
ABOUT THIS GAME

Gensokyo’s fate is in the hands of Reimu once again! Crawl through dungeons, battle battalions of enemies, and investigate enigmas alongside familiar Touhou heroines. FORESIGHT continues the Touhou Genso Wanderer series based on Team Shanghai Alice's doujin game "Touhou Project".

The Story:

Shrine maiden Reimu finds herself in a strange corridor filled with foes. After suffering defeat in battle, she loses consciousness, then awakens inside the Hakurei Shrine with no memory of recent events.

With Marisa Kirisame's help, guide Reimu through dozens of dungeons to save Gensokyo from the torment of an unknown enemy. Rebuild the sacred shrine to its former glory while unveiling clues explaining its destruction. 

Rebuild the Hakurei Shrine!

  • Enlist the help of 60 different Touhou characters, each with distinct spells and abilities, creating custom builds with right-hand weapons and left-hand armor items

  • Battle a brutal bestiary including fairies, vampires, and supernatural shapeshifters to earn materials and treasures to rebuild and outfit the Hakurei Shrine

  • Solve mysterious incidents in the Human Village to acquire stat-boosting “boards” that can raise Reimu’s stats

  • Grow after every enemy encounter, granting permanent stat boosts to Reimu throughout the journey

  • Collect donations and spend earned funds with the help of Suika Ibuki and the many fairies ready to help (in exchange for sake, of course), and enhance the Hakurei Shrine’s form and function

  • Return to the Shrine with each death. But not to worry, overcome setbacks without losing upgrades and newly obtained gear, and fast track completed levels to maintain momentum

NEWLY REVAMPED ILLUSTRATIONS:

Feast your eyes on new looks, illustrations and more for nearly every character! Discover never-before-seen character designs and stills, refreshed familiar faces, and newly-drawn weapon and armor items!

Now then, time to explore those mysteries!

supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
